name: shopify-shop
title: Shopify Shop
description: Browse and search products from a Shopify store.
author: 0xdhrv

commands.name: browse-shop
commands.title: Browse Shop
commands.description: Browse and preview products from a Shopify store

commands.name: search
commands.title: Search Store
commands.description: Search across products, pages, collections, and articles

preferences.name: storeUrl
preferences.title: Shopify Store URL
preferences.description: URL of your Shopify store (e.g. https://mystore.myshopify.com). The store must have its public JSON endpoints enabled (these are on by default for most Shopify themes).

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1
